meta.title: Uccelli Society – Community. Integrity. Generativity.
meta.description: Uccelli Society: A network for education, social exchange and personal development in Zurich.

about.title: Our mission & vision
about.text: Our goal is to build a network that brings together and consolidates knowledge from various fields. This knowledge should enable members to achieve their individual goals and concerns.

bildung.title: Education
bildung.text: We want to provide access to education and information to help those in need improve their standard of living.

soziales.title: Social
soziales.text: We promote social exchange and address current social issues while supporting those affected.

community.title: Community
community.text: We offer members the opportunity to work together on personal projects and strengthen the bond within the Uccelli family.

cta.title: Grow together
cta.text: Interested? Get in touch with us.

history.title: How it all began
history.p1: What is today the Uccelli Society began with a simple encounter and many great conversations. From the desire for belonging, exchange and a community for people with different perspectives, a small group of friends first emerged.
history.p2: Over time, this idea became more: a vision for an open, inclusive association that connects people, promotes potential and creates space for personal development. After years of exchange, the Uccelli association was officially founded in 2021.
history.p3: The name 'Uccelli' – inspired by the Italian word for 'birds' – stands to this day for individuality, freedom and the conviction that diversity is a strength.

about.mission: Uccelli creates an integrative network that promotes education, exchange and personal development — open to all, regardless of background or social class.
about.vision: To build a network over the next 5 years where people from different backgrounds come together, exchange ideas and inspire each other.

team.title: Behind every vision are people
team.text: Meet the personalities who help shape the Uccelli Society, drive projects forward and bring our vision to life every day.

items.a: The Uccelli Society is an integrative network based in Zurich that promotes education, social exchange and personal development. We are open to everyone, regardless of background or social class.

items.q: How can I become a member?
items.a: You can register via our contact form or directly by email to uccelli.society@gmail.com. We look forward to every new member!
Membership is free. We finance ourselves through donations, sponsors and partnerships.
We offer social projects, educational projects like LifeLab and community projects like the Nightshift Music concert series. You can find current projects on our projects page.

items.q: Where do the events take place?
items.a: Most of our events take place in Zurich, often at GZ Höngg or at changing locations. Details can be found with the respective events.

items.q: Can I support the association financially?
items.a: Yes! You can support us via bank transfer. Recipient: Verein Uccelli, Account No: 1148-5358.899, IBAN: CH53 0070 0114 8053 5889 9.

items.q: What does the name Uccelli mean?
items.a: 'Uccelli' is the Italian word for 'birds'. The name stands for freedom, individuality and the conviction that diversity is a strength.

intro.title: Achieving Great Things Together
intro.text: Strong partnerships are the key to success. We are delighted to work with companies that share our vision and support us in achieving our goals.

projekte.subtitle: Growing, learning and connecting together
projekte.intro: Our projects create spaces for exchange, education and personal development. Whether psychological counseling, IT and business courses or creative offerings — we bring people together, promote new perspectives and support individual goals.

kursangebote.subtitle: Learn. Grow. Connect.
kursangebote.intro: Our courses offer more than knowledge — they create opportunities. From IT and business to creative workshops, we support people in developing new skills, sharing experiences and achieving their personal and professional goals.

netzwerk.subtitle: People. Ideas. Possibilities.
netzwerk.intro: Our network brings together people who want to make a difference, learn and grow. In our various groups, different experiences, perspectives and interests meet — and from this, new ideas, exciting projects and valuable connections emerge.

kontakt.title: Get in Touch with Us
kontakt.subtitle: Feel free to contact us, we will get back to you as soon as possible.

events.subtitle: Our upcoming events
events.emptyHint: Follow us on Instagram for updates.
